title: lithocardium canum
intro: Lithocardium canum, also known as Lithospermum canum, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular issues, due to its ability to lower blood pressure and prevent clotting. The health benefits of Lithocardium canum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce the risk of heart disease and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lithocardium canum can be found in the form of dried leaves, capsules, or teas, and are often used in combination with other herbs to support cardiovascular well-being.
